title:
Lesson 1:
Where do you live?
description: 'Vivir' (to live): 'vivo' = I live, 'vives' = you live. '¿Dónde?' = Where? This introduces -ir verbs and location questions.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I live in Madrid. And you?

title:
Lesson 2:
Transportation
description: Transportation: autobús (bus), tren (train), carro/coche (car), bicicleta (bicycle), taxi (taxi), metro (subway).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How do you get to work?

title:
Lesson 3:
Directions
description: Direction words: derecha (right), izquierda (left), recto (straight), cerca (near), lejos (far).

title:
Lesson 4:
Asking for help
description: 'Ayudar' (to help): '¿Me ayudas?' = Can you help me? 'Necesito ayuda' = I need help. Polite phrases.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Of course, what do you need?

title:
Lesson 5:
At the hotel
description: Hotel vocabulary: habitación (room), reserva (reservation), llave (key), recepción (reception).

title:
Lesson 6:
This Way / That Way
description: 'Por aquí' = this way / through here. 'Por ahí' = that way / through there. 'A la derecha' = to the right. 'A la izquierda' = to the left.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Excuse me, how do I get to the bank?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Luego a la derecha, y el banco está a la izquierda.
dialogue.english: Then to the right, and the bank is on the left.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: No, no. Por aquí es más rápido.
dialogue.english: No, no. This way is faster.

title:
Lesson 7:
Turn Right / Turn Left
description: 'Voltea a la derecha' = Turn right. 'Voltea a la izquierda' = Turn left. 'Voltear' is commonly used in Latin America. In Spain you might hear 'gira'.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I'm lost. Can you guide me?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Claro. En la próxima calle, voltea a la derecha.
dialogue.english: Of course. At the next street, turn right.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.spanish: Sí, y luego voltea a la izquierda al llegar al semáforo.
dialogue.english: Yes, and then turn left when you reach the traffic light.
